title: Toolbar
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Toolbar primitive preserving toolbar root, grouped controls, buttons, links, inputs, disabled focusability, orientation, roving focus metadata, activation, ARIA, and data attributes.

registry.reason: Toolbar buttons preserve the local Base UI Button disabled, focusable-when-disabled, and native button semantics.
Toolbar inputs preserve the local Base UI Input controlled value and input-change conventions.
Toolbar roving focus mirrors the local Toggle Group explicit highlight-state conventions.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, keyboard event, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, and Predicate helpers for serializable options and event payloads.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.

deviations.summary: Foldkit consumers own Toolbar highlighted focus state instead of using React CompositeRoot internal state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit registry components preserve Elm-style unidirectional data flow. The helper emits highlight-change facts with optional focus selectors while the consuming model remains the single source of truth.
